title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
